title: Desolate Dwellings
description: Various abandoned structures that contain custom loot!
body:
![Desolate Dwellings Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18950a4536e61010183bcea2aa603750a513bf28.jpeg)

# 🏛️ Description
# This mod is dead! I will be making a separate overhauled mod that is better.
This mod adds various **new structures** to your Minecraft world. From **ancient altars** to **abandoned prisons**! Some of them even have **custom loot** (not completely new items).
### **New structures every week-month!**
# 📃 List of Structures
<details>
<summary>Mud Tower</summary>
An old tower that generates in swamps.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Mountain Altar</summary>
An ancient altar that generates in frozen and jagged peaks biomes. They always keep some knifes around.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Secluded Prison</summary>
An abandoned prison, built on mushroom islands, far away from civilization. Some old equipment is still there.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Quarry</summary>
A small quarry. Used to mine stone and other ores. The miner's pickaxe is still there.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Cherry Storage</summary>
Used to store horse riding equipment.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Sand Shelter</summary>
Some thief's last place of residence.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Pale Hut</summary>
A dilapidated hut.
</details>
